name: Counterfactual Graph for Multi-Agent LLM Calibration

four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: CAGE-CAL proposes a counterfactual agent-graph calibration framework for multi-agent LLMs. It compares observed post-communication agent graphs with matched counterfactual no-communication graphs, capturing pairwise failure correlations and group-level dependencies. Rather than counting how many agents agree, CAGE-CAL estimates the counterfactual shift between observed and no-communication dependence, calibrating confidence accordingly.
